title: Antars Stats
description: A minecraft  RPG mod that adds a simple leveling system, and multiple things
body:
**Antars adds many things, but the main idea of the mod is a leveling system based on Levels
It adds Bosses, items, tools, and many more.
To level up you need to kill any mob, depending from the mob, it could give you more or less xp.
there is also bosses that makes the mod more challenging**

**My discord server:https://discord.gg/ARJqAHaBxS
where you can get the mods early, send me ideias for my mods and chat with people that like minecraft.**


**My Youtube Channel:https://www.youtube.com/@antars-oficial/featured
Where you can see Tutorials, and see the progress of the updates**

**To Spawn some mobs you will need to craft a soul block, that if you combine it with
A Glass Bottle, it will turn into a soul flask, that if you throw on a ghost, it spawns a random boss.**

**This Mod will no longer receive any big updates**
